name: Symptoms from my work fall in Boise showed up weeks later—what to do?
description: Report when symptoms hit, within 180 days.[1]

mainEntity.name: Symptoms from my work fall in Boise showed up weeks later—what to do?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report when symptoms hit, within 180 days.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Report as soon as symptoms appear, linking to the incident.** Utah allows if within 180 days total.[1] Key factors: Delayed injuries common; medical causation proof essential. See doctor immediately, document timeline. Late symptoms don't bar claims if connected.
